hypothesis: If a computational workflow integrating thermodynamic databases, cellular automata simulation, machine learning descriptors, and commercial supplier databases is applied to inorganic material synthesis planning, then it will identify cost-effective and thermodynamically feasible synthesis recipes for target materials such as Ca2SiO4 more efficiently than traditional trial-and-error experimental approaches, because combining thermodynamic optimization with real-world commercial constraints and predictive AI models enables systematic screening of the entire accessible chemical space prior to laboratory synthesis.
